_comment: Bad case 20 — Whisper transkribiert die zweistellige Runway 14 als '1-4' (Bindestrich) im Downwind-Report. Der runway-Extractor stoppte am Bindestrich und extrahierte nur '1', was den assigned_runway-Lock ueberschrieb -> ATC-Antwort sagte 'runway 1' statt 'runway 14'. Fix: Bindestriche/Spaces zwischen Ziffern werden uebersprungen, max. 2 Digits.
name: Bad case 20 — Whisper '1-4' hyphen artifact must not break runway lock

say.text: Tower Hotel Bravo Whiskey Romeo Oscar at parking request taxi runway 14

say.note: Step 2 — ready for departure -> cleared for takeoff (runway 14 must persist)
say.text: Tower Hotel Bravo Whiskey Romeo Oscar holding short runway 14 ready for departure

say.note: Step 3 — wait for auto-correction to PATTERN_ENTRY
Step 4 — Downwind mit Whisper-Hyphen-Artifakt 'Runway 1-4'. ATC must answer with runway 14, NOT runway 1.
say.text: Tower Hotel Bravo Whiskey Romeo Oscar midfield downwind runway 1-4
